case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. ALAMO CAR RENTAL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-05-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH SPOHN--INVESTIGATOR. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY GREGORY PULSCHER--LIABILITY ADJUSTER. NO COSTS, PLAINTIFF IS EXEMPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2014 - JUDGMENT.
